_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.447), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.2/10 (raw 0.224). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [disassembling, pcs, physically] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.884, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in physically disassembling PCs." and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.449 > STS 0.224 (gap +0.225). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [disassembling, pcs, physically]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].
